report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: D-backs fall as Marte fails to challenge strike 3 ...

items.headline: Ohtani had lubricant injected into knee, not drain...
items.detail: Shohei Ohtani had a lubricant injected into his left knee, but the Dodgers two-way star did not have fluid drained, according to manager Dave Roberts. Ohtani was in the lineup Friday and will likely will make his next start Wednesday at Philadelphia.

items.headline: Bueckers bemoans no Black women HC in WNBA
items.detail: Wings star Paige Bueckers called out the lack of Black women head coaches in the WNBA, saying Black women deserve "the same equal opportunity" to coach in the league.

items.headline: McBride, Miles combine for 70 points in Lynx win
items.detail: Minnesota rookie Olivia Miles scored a career-high 33, becoming the first WNBA player to reach 400 points, 100 rebounds and 100 assists in only 22 career games, and the Lynx defeated the Phoenix Mercury 104-100 Monday night for a third straight victory.
items.relevance_reason: ESPN precision source; matches wnba

items.headline: LeBron still mum as 'trust the process' sparks tiz...
